meaning: adj.纷乱的,动乱不安的,动乱的,暴乱的
examples: The troublous feeling is due to the disturbance of outer world.
All we came from the 6th police station……in leaving here is a troublous matter, so we should look after this.
Seeing that I asked Fishhook away mysteriously, they followed us secretly and now they wanted to leave this troublous corsair with Caesar.
